falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 3.5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish breakout, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% of the 30-day average volume on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate extreme buying/selling pressure, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' phase by confirming a clear trend

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would demonstrate escalating momentum beyond the current 40 level, proving the pattern is not a bottom but a blowoff phase

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
